vl_end_blood_0.title: Dry Thirst
vl_end_blood_0.body: Not a single drop left. Hunger sets in and your clan grows weaker.

vl_end_blood_100.title: Crimson Tide
vl_end_blood_100.body: Blood flows everywhere, in cellars, streets, rituals. After drinking too much, the vampires stop listening to you, and the hunters are coming.

vl_end_hunters_0.title: Night Without a Hunt
vl_end_hunters_0.body: No more torches, no more crosses, no more hunters. Vampires rule the world, but they are no longer kept in check. There are no humans left, and therefore no blood left either.

vl_end_hunters_100.title: Crosses and Sirens
vl_end_hunters_100.body: They are everywhere. Militias, hunters, priests, blessed weapons. The night itself seems to betray you. Going out to feed has become too dangerous.

vl_end_clan_0.title: Solitude of the Throne
vl_end_clan_0.body: Your clan has died out, scattered, or turned against you. The castle still stands, but it echoes hollow.

vl_end_clan_100.title: Dynasty of Ash
vl_end_clan_100.body: Your heirs, your bloodlines, your protégés keep multiplying… too much. Many want your place. Prepare your departure.

vl_end_secret_0.title: Broad Daylight
vl_end_secret_0.body: Your existence is no longer a whisper. Rumors spread, doors close, and the night is no longer enough to protect you. You have become a target, and humans are gathering to hunt you down.

vl_end_secret_100.title: Absolute Secret
vl_end_secret_100.body: No one knows, no one sees, no one comes near. By hiding everything, you ended up alone in the shadows.
